title: PageLayout
description: Tenant-scoped layout document that assigns widget instances to slots on a content page. Stored as page data (not bundle code). Consumed by <widget-host> at mount time. See specs/crosscut/widgets.md.

version.description: Schema version. Hosts MUST reject versions they do not support.

slots.description: Map of slot name to ordered array of widget instances. Slot names are surface-defined; order is significant.

widgetId.description: Identifier of the widget to mount. MUST match a widget registered in the active bundle (INV-WIDGET-10).

instanceId.description: Stable per-page-layout instance identifier. Used by the mediator to scope topic permissions and by observability to identify mounts.

config.description: Per-instance configuration. The host validates this against the widget manifest's configSchema before mount (INV-WIDGET-06).

isolationOverride.description: Optional override of the manifest's declared isolation mode. A host MAY reject overrides that weaken isolation.

$comment: Layout is pure tenant data. Widget code is shipped by the UI bundle; this document only references widgets by id.
